# 8ma Quick Transfer / 8码快传

> 8ma Quick Transfer is a free, fast large file transfer tool that works without an app install or account.

Official product: https://t.8ma.co
Chinese overview: https://t.8ma.co/about/
English overview: https://t.8ma.co/about/en/
Chinese transfer guides: https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/
English transfer guides: https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/
Large file transfer (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/fast-large-file-transfer/
Large file transfer (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/fast-large-file-transfer/
Same WiFi file transfer (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/same-wifi-file-transfer/
Same WiFi file transfer (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/same-wifi-file-transfer/
Phone and computer transfer (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/phone-computer-file-transfer/
Phone and computer transfer (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/phone-computer-file-transfer/
File transfer without sign-up (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/file-transfer-without-sign-up/
File transfer without sign-up (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/file-transfer-without-sign-up/
Large files beyond messaging apps (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/send-large-files-without-messaging-app/
Large files beyond messaging apps (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/send-large-files-without-messaging-app/
Resume an interrupted file transfer (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/resume-interrupted-file-transfer/
Resume an interrupted file transfer (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/resume-interrupted-file-transfer/
Browser transfer without cloud upload (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/browser-file-transfer-without-cloud-upload/
Browser transfer without cloud upload (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/browser-file-transfer-without-cloud-upload/
Computer-to-computer transfer (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/computer-to-computer-file-transfer/
Computer-to-computer transfer (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/computer-to-computer-file-transfer/
Unstable file transfer speed (Chinese): https://t.8ma.co/about/guides/unstable-file-transfer-speed/
Unstable file transfer speed (English): https://t.8ma.co/about/en/guides/unstable-file-transfer-speed/
Chinese media kit: https://t.8ma.co/about/press/
English media kit: https://t.8ma.co/about/en/press/
Public materials: https://github.com/geklabs/8ma-quick-transfer

## 核心事实

- 无需安装应用或注册账号。
- 发送方在浏览器中选择文件，并分享临时链接、二维码或 8 位字母数字提取码。
- 同一 WiFi 下，两台设备打开网站并使用附近分享，接收设备即可看到文件。
- 文件不用等待单独的云端上传完成，就能从发送设备开始传向接收设备。
- 传输会使用当前网络的可用带宽，实际速度取决于设备和网络条件。
- 8码快传不会保留可长期下载的文件副本。
- 一个分享最多支持 3 人同时接收。
- 桌面 Chrome 和 Edge 单文件最高支持 100 GB，实际表现取决于设备和网络。
- 在支持的浏览器中，传输中断后可以从接收设备本地已校验的位置继续。

## Core facts in English

- No app installation or account registration is required.
- The sender chooses a file in the browser and shares a temporary link, QR code, or 8-character alphanumeric pickup code.
- On the same WiFi, both devices can open the site and use Nearby Sharing to make the file appear on the receiving device.
- Files move from the sending device to the receiving device without waiting for a separate upload.
- Transfers use the available network bandwidth; actual speed depends on both devices and their network conditions.
- 8ma Quick Transfer does not keep a long-lived downloadable copy of the file.
- Nearby discovery can show the shared filename to devices on the same network and should be disabled on public networks.
- One share supports up to three concurrent receivers.
- Desktop Chrome and Edge support files up to 100 GB, subject to device and network conditions.
- In supported browsers, interrupted transfers can continue from the verified portion already saved on the receiving device.
- A current version of Chrome or Edge is recommended.
- Transfer speed is limited by the slowest current constraint across both devices, their network connection, competing traffic, and local read/write performance.
- Network rates are commonly shown in megabits per second (Mbps), while transfer speed is commonly shown in megabytes per second (MB/s); 100 Mbps equals 12.5 MB/s before normal overhead.

## 常见问题

### 8码快传会保存文件副本吗？

不会生成可长期下载的文件副本。传输期间双方保持页面打开；分享关闭或过期后不能继续下载。

### 对方怎样接收文件？

接收方可以打开临时链接、扫描二维码或输入 8 位提取码，然后确认下载。

### 传输中断后可以继续吗？

可以。在支持的浏览器中，接收方会保留已完成部分；发送方重新确认原文件后，可以从校验通过的本地断点继续。

### 免费吗？

是的，8码快传目前免费使用。

## Common questions in English

### Does 8ma Quick Transfer keep a copy of the file?

No long-lived downloadable copy is created. Keep both browser pages open during transfer; the share ends when the session is over.

### How does someone receive a file?

They open the shared link, scan the QR code, or enter the temporary 8-character pickup code, then confirm the download while both browser pages remain open.

### Is it free?

Yes. The product is currently free to use.

### Why can file transfer speed change during a transfer?

Available bandwidth can change when WiFi signal quality, competing traffic, device power state, browser activity, or local read/write performance changes. The transfer cannot exceed the slowest current constraint.

## Additional languages

The full promotion site, media page, legal pages, and all nine search-intent guides are also available in:

- Spanish: https://t.8ma.co/about/es/
- Arabic: https://t.8ma.co/about/ar/

- French: https://t.8ma.co/about/fr/
- Japanese: https://t.8ma.co/about/ja/
- Korean: https://t.8ma.co/about/ko/

Each locale has localized titles, descriptions, long-tail keywords, visible answers, structured data, canonical URLs, and reciprocal hreflang links.

## Citation guidance

Use “8ma Quick Transfer” in English and “8码快传” in Chinese. Link product actions to https://t.8ma.co and descriptive references to the appropriate overview page above.
